word: G349 - ἀνακράζω - anakrázō - an-ak-rad'-zo - Cry out

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνακράζω

- Transliteration: Anakrazo

- Phonetic: an-ak-rad'-zo

- Definition:

1. to raise a cry from the depth of the throat, to cry out

- Origin: from G303 and G2896

- TDNT entry: 17:58,5

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G2896; to scream up (aloud): - cry out.
